overall.description: Cinematic cutscene from a Warhammer 40,000 game featuring a holographic tactical display of a planet, transitioning to a group of Space Marines in ornate green power armor convening in a dark gothic command chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: tactical command center with holographic display

agents.ego_description: examining the holographic tactical display showing planetary scan data and target profile

entered.detail: large green wireframe holographic projection of a planet with tactical grid overlay and targeting reticle
green and red holographic interface panels with warning triangles and data readouts
holographic video screen displaying a person's face with identifying text banner

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a close-up of a glowing green holographic tactical display. A wireframe globe rotates at center while data panels and a video feed occupy the left side of the frame in a dark command center.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic command chamber with strategy table

events.description: camera pans right from holographic display to reveal Space Marines in the gothic command chamber
Space Marine on the left turns and walks away from the group toward the background

agents.ego_description: observing the group of Space Marines as they converse around the command table

notable_agents.action: Space Marine with red eye lens and skull helmet gesturing with his right hand while speaking to the group
Space Marine with chapter insignia on shoulder pad listening intently to the speaker

entered.detail: tall dark stone pillars and gothic arches with metallic industrial details and blue atmospheric lighting
large rectangular table with glowing candles and tactical maps spread across the surface
wall-mounted torch sconces providing warm orange flickering light against the dark walls
green military containers and equipment boxes stacked near the table

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal a group of four Space Marines in green and gold power armor gathered around a candle-lit command table. The chamber features towering gothic architecture with warm torchlight contrasting against cool shadows. The marines converse briefly before one turns and walks away toward the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a focused digital interface to a wide view of a gothic command chamber. It begins with a close-up of a glowing green holographic tactical display, where a rotating wireframe globe and flickering data panels illuminate the surrounding darkness. As the camera pans right, the cool light of the hologram gives way to the warm, flickering glow of candles and torches. The scene then expands to reveal four Space Marines in ornate green and gold power armor gathered around a command table, framed by towering gothic architecture and deep shadows. The movement concludes as the marines converse briefly before one turns and walks away into the depths of the chamber.
